approvalSource: Steve May 25 live operator direction: link approvals must be durable and explain what happens after approve/hold/reject, with no crawl, login, purchase, form, worker, backlog, external write, credential, or browser-profile side effects from approval alone.
notes: Approval covers V1.2 decision persistence for BUILD-INTEL-LINK-APPROVAL-SOURCE-PACKETS-001 only. Not approved: starting source workers from approval, broad crawling, paid/private/auth/community/course extraction, purchases, opt-ins, form submissions, external writes, or automatic backlog promotion.
